name: GmailConnector
description: Ingests, manages, and deletes Gmail messages and threads via the Gmail REST API v1 with OAuth 2.0 authorization.

install_fields.label: OAuth Client ID
install_fields.help: The OAuth 2.0 Client ID from the Google Cloud Console. Required to initiate the authorization flow.

install_fields.label: OAuth Client Secret
install_fields.help: The OAuth 2.0 Client Secret from the Google Cloud Console. Required to exchange authorization codes and refresh access tokens.

install_fields.label: OAuth Scopes
install_fields.help: Space-separated OAuth 2.0 scopes to request. Defaults to 'https://www.googleapis.com/auth/gmail.modify https://www.googleapis.com/auth/gmail.send'. The gmail.send scope is required to send email. Add 'https://mail.google.com/' to also enable permanent delete.

install_fields.label: Authorization URL
install_fields.help: Override the OAuth 2.0 authorization endpoint. Defaults to 'https://accounts.google.com/o/oauth2/v2/auth'.

install_fields.label: Token URL
install_fields.help: Override the OAuth 2.0 token endpoint for code exchange and token refresh. Defaults to 'https://oauth2.googleapis.com/token'.

install_fields.label: Base API URL
install_fields.help: Override the Gmail REST API base URL. Defaults to 'https://gmail.googleapis.com/gmail/v1'. Useful for proxied or self-hosted API endpoints.

install_fields.label: Allow Permanent Delete
install_fields.help: When enabled, the connector can permanently delete messages and threads (unrecoverable). Requires the https://mail.google.com/ OAuth scope. Defaults to false (trash/soft-delete only).

install_fields.label: Rate Limit (requests/min)
install_fields.help: Maximum number of Gmail API requests per minute. Defaults to 250 (Gmail API default quota).

install_fields.label: Pagination Type
install_fields.help: Pagination strategy for list operations. Defaults to 'cursor' (Gmail pageToken-based pagination).

install_fields.label: API Version
install_fields.help: Gmail REST API version to use. Defaults to 'v1'.

methods.name: install
methods.description: Validates connector config (requires client_id and client_secret) and returns a PENDING ConnectorStatus — no API call.

methods.name: authorize
methods.description: Exchanges an OAuth 2.0 authorization code for access and refresh tokens using config-driven client_id, client_secret, and token_url.

methods.name: on_token_refresh
methods.description: Refreshes an expired access token using the stored refresh token, sending config-driven client_id and client_secret to the token endpoint.

methods.name: health_check
methods.description: Verifies token validity by calling the Gmail users/me/profile endpoint.

methods.name: sync
methods.description: Ingests new or updated messages via the Gmail list/get API with pageToken pagination; propagates deletions by diffing known IDs against the current response.

methods.name: list_email
methods.description: Lists Gmail messages matching a query string; returns raw page dict including nextPageToken.

methods.name: read_email
methods.description: Fetches a single Gmail message by ID and returns a NormalizedDocument.

methods.name: add_email
methods.description: Applies label IDs to a Gmail message via messages.modify.

methods.name: move_email
methods.description: Moves a Gmail message to a destination label, removing specified source labels (defaults to removing INBOX).

methods.name: update_email
methods.description: Adds and/or removes label IDs on a Gmail message via messages.modify.

methods.name: get_email
methods.description: Fetches a single Gmail message by ID and returns a NormalizedDocument. Identical delegation pattern to read_email.

methods.name: delete_email
methods.description: Alias for delete_message — trashes or permanently deletes a message.

methods.name: remove_email
methods.description: Alias for soft-delete — moves a message to Trash.

methods.name: delete_message
methods.description: Trashes (permanent=False) or permanently deletes (permanent=True) a single Gmail message. Permanent delete requires allow_permanent_delete=True in config.

methods.name: delete_thread
methods.description: Trashes (permanent=False) or permanently deletes (permanent=True) an entire Gmail thread. Permanent delete requires allow_permanent_delete=True in config.

methods.name: bulk_delete
methods.description: Deletes all messages matching a Gmail query; collects all IDs via pageToken pagination first, then deletes individually with per-message error catching.

methods.name: send_email
methods.description: Sends an email by building an RFC 2822 MIME message, base64url-encoding it, and posting to POST /users/me/messages/send. Requires the gmail.send OAuth scope. Returns {id, threadId} of the sent message.

methods.name: post_email
methods.description: Public alias for send_email() — identical signature and behaviour. Provided for API surface completeness.

methods.name: modify_message
methods.description: Directly adds and/or removes label IDs on a Gmail message via POST /users/me/messages/{id}/modify. Standalone public method exposing the modify path independently of add_email/update_email.

methods.name: disconnect
methods.description: Clears stored OAuth tokens and resets the connector auth status to PENDING.
